title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!
